scripts.dev: concurrently --names "HUB,FINANCE,TREINO,TODO" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix hub" "npm run dev --prefix Finance" "npm run dev --prefix Treino" "npm run dev --prefix todolist"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix hub && npm run build --prefix Finance && npm run build --prefix Treino && npm run build --prefix todolist
